generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in the Pacific are now contributing just 1.2% of their GDP to collective defense, while we're carrying over 3.5%? It's time to demand fair burden-sharing. Our security shouldn't come at the cost of our economic stability. #StrongAlliances #FairShare
